title: Giving advice with deber and hay que
subtitle: Give simple advice.
overview: Hay que means one must / it is necessary to.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Hay que practicar todos los días.
It is necessary to arrive early.

items.en: You should not study without resting.

items.es: Hay que escuchar mucho para hablar mejor.
items.en: One must listen a lot to speak better.

items.es: Debes repetir la frase en voz alta.
items.en: You should repeat the sentence aloud.

items.es: Hay que reservar antes de ir.
items.en: It is necessary to book before going.
